Operation 'getSponsors' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. The current description is too minimal and lacks context about the purpose and use case of this reference data. Added explanation of what 'common sponsors' means in the podcast domain, clarified that this is reference data for filtering/analysis, and specified the return format to help AI agents understand when to use this endpoint.

data.current_description: Returns list of common podcast sponsors.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a reference list of common podcast sponsors. This endpoint provides standardized sponsor data that can be used for filtering, matching, or analyzing podcast sponsorship patterns. Returns an array of sponsor objects with identifiers and names.
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal and lacks context about the purpose and use case of this reference data. Added explanation of what 'common sponsors' means in the podcast domain, clarified that this is reference data for filtering/analysis, and specified the return format to help AI agents understand when to use this endpoint.

message: Operation 'getProfessions' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. The current description lacks specificity about the purpose and context of this reference data. Added clarification that this is demographic reference data, explained its use case for audience analysis, and specified the return format to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves reference data for listener professions used in audience demographics. This endpoint provides standardized profession categories that can be used to filter or analyze podcast audiences by listener occupation. Returns an array of profession objects with identifiers and labels.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks specificity about the purpose and context of this reference data. Added clarification that this is demographic reference data, explained its use case for audience analysis, and specified the return format to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getInterests' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. The current description is too generic and doesn't explain the purpose or context of this reference data. Added clarification that this is demographic reference data, explained its use case for audience filtering and analysis, and specified the return format to help AI agents determine when to use this endpoint.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves reference data for listener interests used in audience demographics. This endpoint provides standardized interest categories that can be used to filter or analyze podcast audiences by listener preferences and topics. Returns an array of interest objects with identifiers and labels.
data.reasoning: The current description is too generic and doesn't explain the purpose or context of this reference data. Added clarification that this is demographic reference data, explained its use case for audience filtering and analysis, and specified the return format to help AI agents determine when to use this endpoint.

message: Operation 'getTrends' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks clarity about what metrics are returned, what parameters are required/optional, and the structure of the response. Added details about inputs (podcast identifiers, time range), outputs (metric values, timestamps, trend direction), and use case context for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Returns historical metric trends over time for specified podcasts.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve historical metric trends for podcasts
data.description_suggestion: Returns historical metric trends over time for specified podcasts. Accepts podcast identifiers and optional time range parameters.
